reason: Rebuild Algeria VAT on one reviewed engine across English, French and Swahili. Current DGI guidance updated 23 February 2026 confirms the 19% normal rate, limits 9% to operations enumerated in article 23 of the TCA Code, and locates exemptions in articles 8 to 13. The engine adds and extracts VAT, rounds invoice lines deterministically, and distinguishes real, simplified and IFU regimes without inventing a generic registration threshold. It removes unsupported automatic classifications, zero-rate claims, withholding arithmetic, AI/network submission, result sharing, amount storage, CDN calculation dependencies and email-gated export. Six unit fixtures and seven browser checks are required; no protected golden fixture existed, so there is no carried result delta.
